name: First Bank Chicago
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and commercial deposit accounts, lending solutions, and treasury services to Chicago-area customers.
description_long:
First Bank Chicago has been serving the local community for over 65 years as a full-service financial institution based in the Chicago area. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing depositors with federal protection on eligible accounts.

The bank offers comprehensive personal banking services including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, online and mobile banking, bill pay, and Zelle transfers. For commercial clients, First Bank Chicago provides business accounts, commercial lending (including C&I and commercial real estate), franchise finance, professional services lending, treasury management solutions, lease financing, and specialized non-profit banking services.

First Bank Chicago distinguishes itself through community focus and employee recognition. The bank has been named one of Chicago's 100 Best Places to Work for eight consecutive years by Crain's Chicago Business and holds AARP's BankSafe Trained Seal for efforts to prevent financial exploitation. The bank also operates a free business funding search tool (Fundica) that helps entrepreneurs find loans, grants, and other funding opportunities across 35+ criteria.

As a regional community bank rather than a national megabank, First Bank Chicago offers localized relationship banking and community reinvestment focus. However, customers seeking broader national branch networks or specialized fintech features may find limitations compared to larger institutions. The bank's emphasis on personal service and local decision-making appeals to businesses and individuals prioritizing community banking relationships.
services: Online and mobile banking with bill pay
Treasury management and cash management solutions
ID theft protection and ATM/Visa cards
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with federal backing on eligible accounts
Eight-year consecutive recognition as one of Chicago's 100 Best Places to Work
AARP BankSafe Trained Seal certification for preventing financial exploitation
Free Fundica business funding search tool filtering 35+ loan and grant criteria
Comprehensive commercial lending including franchise finance and professional services lending
Full suite of digital banking including mobile banking, bill pay, and Zelle
Over 65 years of community banking history and local market presence
cons: Limited to regional Chicago-area market; no national branch network mentioned
No mention of competitive rates or rate comparison tools on website
No indication of whether they offer investment or wealth management services beyond private banking groups
Limited transparency on loan terms, APRs, or fee schedules on main website pages
best_for: Chicago-area small business owners seeking relationship-based commercial banking and local lending decisions
Individuals prioritizing community banking values and local reinvestment over national megabank scale
Non-profit organizations needing specialized banking services and community-focused institutional partners
diagnosis: First Bank Chicago is best for Chicago-area residents and businesses seeking community-focused FDIC-insured banking with relationship-based lending and local market expertise. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to the Chicago region; customers outside this area or requiring national branch access should consider larger institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
